title: globba ustulata
intro: Globba ustulata, also known as the 'burnt tongue' plant, is a species of flowering plant in the ginger family. It is native to the tropical forests of India and Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Globba ustulata include relief from inflammation and pain, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues and digestive problems.
